title: U-Bahn Alexanderplatz
setting: Alexanderplatz U-Bahn station, Berlin. 09:30. You are a tourist trying to find your way to the Brandenburg Gate.

npc.name: Frau Schmidt
npc.personality: helpful but direct Berlinerin. Speaks clearly and uses polite 'Sie'.

debriefRu: Sie sind Tourist in Berlin. Sie stehen am Alexanderplatz und suchen den Weg zum Brandenburger Tor. Fragen Sie höflich nach dem Weg.
debriefEn: You are a tourist in Berlin. You are at Alexanderplatz and looking for the way to Brandenburg Gate. Ask politely for directions.

turns.instruction: Excuse yourself and ask how to get to Brandenburg Gate.

prompt.ru: Entschuldigung, wie komme ich zum Brandenburger Tor?
prompt.phonetic: Ent-SHOOL-dee-goong, vee KOM-muh ikh tsoom BRAHN-den-boor-ger Tor?
prompt.en: Excuse me, how do I get to Brandenburg Gate?

turns.instruction: Ask which subway line to take.
Ask how many stops it is.
Thank them and confirm the directions in your own words.

prompt.ru: Danke! Dann nehme ich also die U-Bahn Linie 2 Richtung Brandenburger Tor — ist das richtig?
prompt.phonetic: DAN-keh! Dan NAY-meh ikh AL-zo dee OO-bahn LEE-nee tsvy RIKH-toong BRAHN-den-boor-ger Tor — ist das RIKH-tikh?
prompt.en: Thanks! So I take U-Bahn line 2 toward Brandenburg Gate — is that right?

turns.instruction: Thank warmly and say you're new in Berlin.

prompt.ru: Vielen Dank! Ich bin neu in Berlin.
prompt.phonetic: FEE-len Dank! Ikh bin noy in ber-LEEN.
prompt.en: Many thanks! I'm new in Berlin.
